mechanisms.public_exercise: Execute copied RAKE/topic-hint helpers over public text and prove stopword-only text emits no phrase candidates.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Navigation hint scoring only; not raw-seed semantic truth or operator voice export.

mechanisms.public_exercise: Execute copied diagnostic distiller on public assistant/user-tail payloads and prove source roles remain distinct.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Distillation projection only; not capture authority or body persistence.

mechanisms.public_exercise: Execute copied Type-B to Type-A scorer over public handoff text and require containment/anchor confidence.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Advisory linkage score only; not operator attribution truth or transcript export.

mechanisms.public_exercise: Execute copied observed-window merge over hashed public turn metadata and prove rerender windows do not duplicate turns.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Private thread-memory algorithm specimen only; no raw user or assistant text is exported.

mechanisms.public_exercise: Execute copied market situation graph builder on a public synthetic mart and require counterevidence and not-investment-advice guards.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Backend graph contract only; not live market data or trading advice.

mechanisms.public_exercise: Execute copied numeric assurance over public bad-scale rows and require blocking findings.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Numeric display contract only; not feed fetching or economic validation.

mechanisms.public_exercise: Execute the macro status policy judge after exact-copy validation and prove malformed policy blocks judgment.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Status-transition judgment only; not publication or truth authority.

mechanisms.public_exercise: Execute copied path normalization and overlap guards over public paths.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Clone-local coordination guard only; not private Work Ledger or distributed scheduler.

mechanisms.public_exercise: Execute copied market-clock due-point calculation and prove already-fired points are suppressed.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Clock planning only; not live market sampling or daemon launch.

mechanisms.public_exercise: Execute copied provider-recovery scope classifier and prove timeout is model-scoped while duplicate rows do not suppress provider capacity.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Provider admission classification only; not live provider retry authority.

mechanisms.public_exercise: Execute copied demo-take time remap helper and prove paused wall-clock time is subtracted from video time.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Temporal join helper only; not release of footage, transcript, audio, or video.
